title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 92.930 - Sale of lands subject to covenants and easements
text:
92.930.  Sale of lands subject to covenants and easements. — Any sale of lands under this chapter shall be subject to valid recorded covenants running with the land and valid easements of record or in use.
(L. 2013 S.B. 23 § 92.387)
